executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned verification is passing, but the live system is still blocked by docs and marketing owner loops failing their own independent verifier contracts.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Clear the docs verifier/editorial contradictions and let the marketing measurement-hold/adoption repair window finish before any global green claim.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus jobs.json comparison with explicit live-vs-persisted separation

owns: bounded timeout reruns and verifier refreshes
syncing research artifacts into the git repo

findings.title: Docs and marketing remain the live blocker domains
findings.mechanism: docs verifier latest.md/latest.json are still fail and marketing independent verification is fail; health monitor shows 14 current issues and all live blockers are docs-owned or marketing-owned.
findings.root_cause: Docs still has editorial/agentic contradictions and marketing is in measurement_hold with flat primary-repo adoption plus needs_repair workflow state.
findings.recommended_fix: Repair the docs drift in the owning docs loop and wait out / complete the live marketing repair window before recertifying the whole stack.

findings.title: Architecture watchdog itself is currently localized and passing
findings.mechanism: loop_integrity_latest.json keeps agent-architecture-watchdog status=ok, agent_architecture_verifier_latest.md is independently verified pass, and checker returns AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK.
findings.root_cause: Architecture verification is now separating external owner-loop failures from architecture-owned faults.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep freshness gating and owner-domain localization fail-closed.

findings.title: Live scheduler topology is clean right now
findings.mechanism: openclaw cron list --json shows 20 live jobs, 20 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, and 0 error; only persisted history still lists 3 disabled jobs.
findings.root_cause: No current scheduler drift is visible in the live runtime.
findings.recommended_fix: No scheduler repair needed beyond keeping live-vs-persisted reporting separated.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get the docs owner loop back to independent pass
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Docs is still red on both verifier contract and stability.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Removes the docs blocker domain from live health state.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Let the marketing measurement-hold window expire and clear needs_repair / flat-adoption blockers with a fresh independent pass
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing is the other live blocker and is still explicitly fail-closed.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Removes the last external blocker domain.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Rerun architecture independent verification after either owner loop materially changes state
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Architecture is already localized; next verdict movement depends on external owner evidence.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Keeps architecture signoff aligned with live owner-loop state.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: health_monitor.py reran at 2026-05-24T07:21:25.362507 and reconfirmed 14 live issues, all still localized to docs/marketing.

agent_architecture_independent_verify.py refreshed to qualified_pass at 2026-05-24T07:21:27.752333+02:00, and agent_architecture_verifier.py returned independently verified pass on that fresh artifact.
agent_architecture_checker.py still returns AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK after the refresh.
Direct live check confirms 20 jobs, 20 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 0 error.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification says the architecture loop is sound on fresh evidence, with only external docs and marketing blockers remaining.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh docs independent pass after the docs loop clears editorial/verifier contradictions.
Fresh marketing independent pass after the measurement-hold and flat-adoption blockers clear.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Two owner loops are still red at the same time
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Docs is still failing its independent verifier while marketing is fail-closed under measurement_hold_active and flat primary-repo adoption, so the product stack is not globally green.

notes: Architecture green here means the architecture verifier chain passed on fresh evidence; it does not mean the full product stack is globally healthy.
Docs reruns were lock-sensitive during this window, so docs stayed localized as an external blocker rather than being reclassified as architecture red.
The marketing loop remains in a measurement hold until 2026-05-24T07:52:32.840986+02:00, so certification is expected to stay red until that owner loop clears its own repair window.
